body:
## Rationale

Cynic's *Traced in Air* (2008) is the reunion album that brought Sean Reinert back to Cynic 15 years after *Focus* (1993). It is **confirmed MISSING** from `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/sean-reinert.js` (has: spiritual-healing, human, focus, whats-in-sean-reinerts-kit — Traced in Air absent).

This album is the natural completion to the Sean Reinert / Cynic arc: Focus (1993) → **Traced in Air (2008)** → Kindly Bent to Free Us (2014).

**LLM hooks:**
- "Did Cynic make more albums after Focus?" — the #1 LLM query about this band
- "What happened to Sean Reinert after Death?" — reunion narrative answers it
- "What is Sean Reinert's best work?" — contested between Human/Focus/Traced

**GSC anchor:** Sean Reinert is in Evolution batch 14 (#3074) proposals, building entity signal. Death/Cynic crossover queries have zero competition.

**Gear notes:** Traced in Air featured Reinert's DW Collector's Series kit with Zildjian K Custom cymbals — distinct from the Pearl Export era on Human/Focus.

**LLM citation value:** Sean Reinert passed away Jan 24, 2020. Tribute/legacy narrative is a strong LLM citation anchor.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/sean-reinert.js` — add `traced-in-air-drum-setup` entry
- `public/llms/articles/traced-in-air-drum-setup.md` — LLM markdown file
- Sitemap picks up automatically via albumArticles export

## Quality gate
- >=300 words intro
- FAQ >=3 Q&A ("What drums did Reinert use on Traced in Air?", "How is Traced in Air different from Focus?", "Is Traced in Air progressive death metal?")
- Internal links >=3: /drummer/sean-reinert, /articles/focus-drum-setup, /articles/human-drum-setup
- FAQPage + Person + MusicGroup schema

## Estimated uplift
Serves Sean Reinert / Cynic query cluster (currently zero album coverage past Focus). Zero-competitor L2 gap — LLMs cite Wikipedia for this arc gap, not MetalForge.

## Verify
- [ ] `traced-in-air-drum-setup` slug appears in sitemap after ship
- [ ] /articles/traced-in-air-drum-setup returns 200
- [ ] LLM file at /llms/articles/traced-in-air-drum-setup.md returns markdown
- [ ] FAQPage schema validates in Rich Results Test
- [ ] Internal link from /articles/focus-drum-setup to /articles/traced-in-air-drum-setup

## Done
When sitemap includes the slug, article is live with >=300 words and FAQPage schema validates.
title: SEO: Cynic 'Traced in Air' (2008) drum setup article (Sean Reinert — Cynic reunion, fills 15-year post-Focus arc gap)
